title: Offline Sudoku
subtitle: Classic daily number puzzles
promoText: Play clean classic Sudoku anywhere. Works offline, with daily puzzles, pencil notes, hints, stats, dark mode, and no ads while you solve.
description:
Offline Sudoku is a clean, focused Sudoku app that works anywhere, no Wi-Fi needed.

Play classic 9x9 Sudoku puzzles with pencil notes, hints, daily challenges, stats, streaks, dark mode, and no ads while you solve.

Designed for focused solving
- No ads during gameplay
- Clean, readable Sudoku board
- Fast number input
- Pencil notes
- Undo and erase
- Highlight rows, columns, boxes, and matching numbers
- Optional mistake checking
- Auto-save progress

Play every day
- Daily Sudoku puzzle
- Daily streaks
- Completion stats
- Best times by difficulty
- Mistake-free tracking
- Shareable results

Works offline
- Start puzzles without internet
- Continue games offline
- Play daily puzzles offline
- View stats offline
- Change settings offline

Choose your challenge
- Easy
- Medium
- Hard
- Expert

Comfortable to use
- Light mode
- Dark mode
- Haptics toggle
- Timer toggle
- Large, clear numbers
- Clean visual design
- Hardware keyboard support on iPad

Offline Sudoku is made for people who want a simple, respectful Sudoku app: classic puzzles, offline play, and no interruptions while solving.
releaseNotes: Arrow keys on a hardware keyboard now move the selection around the board, with VoiceOver announcements as you go. Typing a digit on the cell that already holds it clears it, and rejected keystrokes shake the matching numbers on the board. Completed numbers no longer lock while duplicate entries are on the board. New settings let you toggle the coloring of your own entries and revealed hints.
